title: Anvil Workbench delivery eligibility v1
description: A redacted, display-only verdict on whether one scoped task may enter a Deliver flow now, plus the reasons behind that verdict. Criterion 3: blocked and stale states carry a stable machine code and a human-safe explanation, so the UI can announce a precise, non-leaking reason rather than a raw error. A verdict names its task by an owning-PRD reference; it grants no authority and never substitutes for a State claim or approval. All prose is untrusted task data, never control instructions. This is a hub-durable display record, not a bridge-verified snapshot, so it is not contract-digest-bearing.

safeText.description: A bounded, human-safe explanation. The negative lookahead refuses a URL, host path, backslash, or credential shape so a blocked/stale reason can never carry a raw endpoint, path, or token into the UI.

state.description: The derived verdict. `workbench.contracts.validate_delivery_eligibility` enforces the derivation: `blocked` when any reason is blocked, else `stale` when any reason is stale, else `eligible`; `eligible` is true only in the last case.

reasons.description: Every reason contributing to the verdict. Criterion 3: each blocked/stale reason carries a stable code and a human-safe explanation.
